Comment.value: Also work for IO concpet and Legacy IO concept

0 + Count(FAT IO Value::PrimaryKey) + Count(FAT Page item @ IO Legacy::PrimaryKey) + Count ( FAT List item @ IO::PrimaryKey ) + Count (FAT IO @ Source data IO::PrimaryKey) + Count (FAT Score Category @ IO::PrimaryKey) // No need to check for patterncount in IO arrays, since IO Arrays are 1. Legacy and 2. Always corresponds to a Write IO.
Oct 2024: Re-write to use same approach as for lists since IOs can be used in IOs NOT STARTED YET

Calculation.Text: "List used in both Page items and IOs"
"This list is used in both Page items and IOs.¶¶What do you want to view?"
"No page items or IOs are currently using this list."
"This IO is used in the dynamic list called: \"" & $dynamic_list_name & "\".¶¶Look for this list in list overview. "

Comment.value: Old approach - only check page items
Find both legacy and new io
Search for page items where a list of IOs are included

Calculation.Text: "IO used in List but list is not used"
"This IO is used in a list but the list is not attached to a page item yet."

Comment.value: Search IO in BOTH legacy IO and IO
Search for page items where a list of IOs are included
Search IO in BOTH legacy IO and IO
Search for page items where a list of IOs are included
Did NOT WORK for IO Rate type!!!!
